news.title: RJ Schreck singles on a ground ball to center fielder Steward Berroa. Jonatan Clase scores. Josh Kasevich to 3rd. RJ Schreck to 2nd. RJ Schreck advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by center fielder Steward Berroa. - MLB.com
